chapter_title.en: Visiting a Believer Socially and When He is Ill

text: 153 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من زار أخاه المؤمن قال الرب جل جلاله: أيها الزائر، طبت وطابت لك الجنة.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 153. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: When one visits his brother-in-faith, the Lord [M.G] says, 'O you who are visiting! Rejoice and enjoy Paradise.'
